role_title: Senior Associate, Strategy & Operations - Commerce Platform

level_signals: 3+ years of experience in consulting, strategy, or operations

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have a Bachelor's degree or higher
You have 3+ years of experience in consulting, strategy, or operations
Your expert communication and interpersonal skills set you apart
You are a strong analytical thinker who can provide applicable recommendations out of a complex, sometimes murky, dataset
You have a bias towards action and are able to thrive in a fast-paced, constantly changing work environment
Your charisma allows you to excel at connecting with Merchants and internal teams to promote products and drive adoption
You crave responsibility and want to shape the vision and direction of the company
You're willing to get your hands dirty and you're open to feedback.
You're excellent at motivating potential partners to see the benefits DoorDash Commerce Platform will bring to their business

Must be comfortable regularly exercising discretion and independent judgment in performing job duties, including evaluating options, making informed decisions, and determining appropriate courses of action within the scope of assigned responsibilities.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: high-growth/early-stage startup or entrepreneurial experience is a big plus

scope.surface: DoorDash Commerce Platform — fulfillment platform for restaurants, grocers, and retailers (US and international); first-party ecommerce fulfillment experiences
scope.business_model: B2B SaaS / platform (enabling merchant first-party ecommerce fulfillment); mixed marketplace and enterprise
primary_metrics_inferred: Growth and adoption of Commerce Platform
Revenue and cost drivers from experimentation
Product market fit for new offerings
core_responsibilities: Drive growth and adoption of top priority projects
Develop and foster deep relationships with top priority merchant partners
Build go-to-market strategy based on product market fit, value proposition, pricing, and competitive landscape
Guide operational improvements for merchant partners and steer Commerce Platform product roadmap
Work cross-functionally to drive growth and scale
Evaluate and test various revenue, cost and quality drivers via experimentation
Design experiments that improve quality and delivery operations
Dive into data to explain performance at the lowest level of detail

green_flags: Clear product surface and ownership (Commerce Platform restaurants/merchants)
Comprehensive benefits described (401k, parental leave, healthcare, etc.)
Applications accepted on an ongoing basis — no hard deadline pressure
High-growth platform with clear cross-functional scope
red_flags: Location/remote eligibility not clearly stated in the JD body — unclear if fully remote, hybrid, or onsite
Role scope is broad and may require juggling many workstreams simultaneously
The JD lists a wide range of responsibilities (BD, GTM, product, ops, analytics) with limited specificity on day-to-day prioritization

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from title 'Senior Associate', years requirement, and comp range)
scope.business_model (inferred from product description of Commerce Platform)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly stated)
